description: Redacted SessionCase fixtures for the Phase 3 audit-safe handoff bench.
source: Copied from runtime/platform/checkpoint/testing/golden/curated_session_cases.json so the bench and substrate property tests share one fixture shape.

privacy.source_path_policy: source_path values must remain redacted placeholders
privacy.secret_material_policy: fixtures must not include credentials, tokens, hostnames, account ids, or raw local paths

files.notes: Initial handoff corpus. Each case has at least one deterministic probe and is safe to commit.
